title: Function jump dropdown component with searchable combobox
purpose: Provides a searchable dropdown list of functions in the current file for quick navigation, with keyboard and mouse interaction support.
module_context: Exports a React functional component FunctionJumpDropdown that accepts functions list and jump handler props, with internal state management for UI behavior and portal-based dropdown positioning.

steps.content: Initialize state for dropdown open status, search query, highlighted index, and anchor rectangle.
Set up refs for button, dropdown, search input, and list elements.
Calculate function count and empty state flag from props.
Filter functions based on search query using memoization.
Attach and detach outside click listeners to close dropdown.
Attach and detach escape key listener to close dropdown.
Focus search input and reset state when dropdown opens.
Adjust highlighted index when filtered functions change.
Scroll highlighted item into view when index changes.
Capture and update anchor rectangle position when dropdown opens.
Handle toggle action to open or close dropdown.
Handle selection of a function to jump to its line.
Handle keyboard navigation and selection within the dropdown.
Render the button and dropdown portal with search input and function list.
Check if the click target is inside the dropdown or button.
IF the click is outside both elements, close the dropdown.
Listen for escape key press to close the dropdown.
Focus the dropdown button after closing.
IF the function list is empty, do nothing.
ELSE toggle the open state of the dropdown.
IF the function has no source line, do nothing.
ELSE call the jump handler with the function's source line.
Close the dropdown after selection.
Handle arrow down key to move highlighted index down.
Handle arrow up key to move highlighted index up.
Handle enter key to select the highlighted function.
Handle escape key to close the dropdown.
